saints.en: The Holy Martyr Aquilina; The Holy Triphillius, Bishop of Leucosia on Cyprus; Our Venerable Father Anthony of Padua.

rubrics:
Вечірня: «Блажен муж». На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир Сострадання, Сл., І нині: Сострадання. Вхід. Прокімен дня. 3 читання: Єремії 2, 13, 15, 17-19; 3, 12-18, 22-26; Єремії 3, 40-41, 55-64; 4, 1-2, 7, 11, 20; 5, 19, 21; Єремії 1, 1-3, 11-13, 15-17, 20. Стиховня Сострадання. По «Отче наш»: тр. Сострадання. Відпуст з помин. свята.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь» тр. Сострадання (2), Сл., І нині: тр. той самий. Катизми черг., сідал. Сострадання. Полієлей, Величання, пополієлейний сідал. Степенна «Від юності моєї», прокімен. Єв. Ів. зач. 61; 19, 25-27. Пс. 50, стихира Сострадання та канон. Канон «Як по суші пройшов Ізраїль». Катавасія «Відкрию уста мої». По 3-ій – сідал. Сострадання. По 6-ій – конд.-ікос Сострадання. Замість «Величай, душе моя, Господа» – приспів свята. По 9-ій – світил. Сострадання, Сл., І нині: світил. той самий. Хвалитні Сострадання. По вел. славослов'ї – тр. Сострадання.
Часи: на всіх – тропар і конд. свята.
Літургія: антифони повсякденні. Тропар свята, Сл., І нині: конд. свята. Прокімен і алилуя свята. Ап. – Флп. зач. 240; 2, 5-11; Єв. – Ів. зач. 61; 19, 25-27. Замість «Достойно» - - ірмос 9-ї пісні канону з його приспівом. Причасний свята.

troparion_en.text: Your lamb, Aquilina, O Jesus, cries in a loud voice:* “You, O my Bridegroom, I love; and, seeking You, I undergo martyrdom.* And with You I am crucified and buried in Your baptism,* and I suffer for Your sake that I may reign with You.* And I die on Your behalf that I may live in You.* Receive me as a spotless sacrifice,* sacrificed for You with love.”* Through her intercession in Your mercy save our souls.

matched_oca_saint: Saint Triphyllius, Bishop of Leucosia (Nicosia), Cyprus

oca_saints.name: Martyr Aquilina of Byblos in Syria

troparion.text: Your lamb Aquilina, calls out to You, O Jesus, in a loud voice: / “I love You, my Bridegroom, and in seeking You I endure suffering. / In baptism I was crucified so that I might reign in You, / and I died so that I might live with You. / Accept me as a pure sacrifice, / for I have offered myself in love.” / Through her prayers save our souls, since You are merciful.

kontakion.text: You ascended to the heights through martyrdom, all-honorable Aquilina, / having purified your soul through the virtues of your virginity. / You were wounded with love for Christ your bridegroom, / before whom you stand rejoicing with the angels; / together with them unceasingly pray for us all.

oca_saints.name: Saint Triphyllius, Bishop of Leucosia (Nicosia), Cyprus

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Triphyllius, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

oca_saints.name: Venerable Andronikos, Disciple of Saint Sergius

troparion.text: Having loved silence from your youth, you came to Mount Makovets, O blessed Andrónikos,  / and established a coenobitic Monastery in the earthly city of Moscow; /  and now as you rejoice in the abode of the Heavenly City,  / pray to Christ God for the salvation of our souls.

By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Savva, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

Your holy martyr Antonina, O Lord, / through her sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, she laid low her adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through her intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr Antonina;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.

oca_saints.name: Saint Anna and her son, Saint John, of Constantinople

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O holy Anna and John, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Venerable James, who was deceived and worshiped the Antichrist

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father James, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Saint Antipater, Bishop of Bostra, Arabia

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Antipater, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Anthimus, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

Your holy martyrs O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Transfer of the relics of Saint Paraskevḗ the New

troparion.text: You loved the solitary and hesychastic life, /  and then, with diligence, you hastened after Christ, your Bridegroom, and took up His easy yoke in your youth.  / Armed with the Sign of the Cross,  / you contended courageously against noetic enemies; /  through fasting, prayer, and by shedding tears,  / you extinguished the embers of the passions, O glorious Paraskevḗ. /  Now, standing in the heavenly Bridal Chamber of Christ, together with the wise virgins,  /  intercede for us who honor your holy memory.

kontakion.text: Devoutly let us all praise the most honorable Paraskevḗ,  / a holy intercessor for the afflicted;  / for she left this perishable life behind and received eternal incorruption.  / Therefore, she has been given the grace of working miracles, by the command of God.

kontakion_en.text: We, all the faithful, have found your shrine to be a place of spiritual healing,* and we cry aloud to you: “O glorious virgin martyr, Aquilina,* pray unceasingly to Christ our God for all of us!”
